summary: The diff implements defensive coding and error handling improvements across the frontend to prevent deployment crashes, but lacks evidence of investigating the root cause of the Version 21 deployment error or verification that deployment actually completes successfully.

missing_requirements.requirement: Investigate and fix the deployment error that occurred in Version 21 production deployment
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence of investigation into what caused the Version 21 deployment error. Changes show preventive error handling but no root cause analysis, deployment configuration fixes, or documentation of what the original error was.
No deployment configuration changes, build script modifications, or CI/CD updates are present in the diff. Only runtime error handling was added, which doesn't address deployment-time failures.

missing_requirements.requirement: Application is accessible in production environment
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence of deployment testing, production environment validation, or infrastructure changes that would ensure production accessibility.
